commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh On that day did king Ahasuerus give the house of Haman the Jews' enemy unto Esther the queen. And Mordecai came before the king; for Esther had told what he was unto her. Wine was only used at great feasts, Ecclesiasticus xxxi. Water was served up first, from the river Choaspes only. The king and his eldest son were allowed to drink of "the golden waters "of which they alone had 70 fountains. ) Their wine was brought from Chelbon, near Damascus. ) (Ezechiel xxvii.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
